top3.sql:
WITH branch_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        district_id,
        AVG(A11) AS avg_salary
    FROM district
    GROUP BY district_id
),
highest_salary_branch AS (
    SELECT 
        district_id
    FROM branch_avg_salary
    ORDER BY avg_salary DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
oldest_client_in_highest_branch AS (
    SELECT 
        c.gender,
        c.birth_date
    FROM client c
    JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
    WHERE a.district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM highest_salary_branch)
...

    GROUP BY district_id
),
highest_salary_branch AS (

    ORDER BY avg_salary DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
oldest_client_in_highest_branch AS (
    SELECT 
        c.gender
    FROM client c
    INNER JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
    INNER JOIN highest_salary_branch h ON a.district_id = h.district_id
    ORDER BY c.birth_date ...
